arts.ttl: Liverpool sign Bayern Munich's Sam Kerr on loan
arts.sum: Liverpool have signed Scotland international Sam Kerr on loan from Bayern Munich for the remainder of the 2024-25 season, the club have announced.

arts.ttl: Conor McGregor reveals he wants to buy TWO football clubs in now-deleted social media post after Elon Musk's father claimed billionaire tycoon wanted to snap up Liverpool
arts.sum: UFC superstar McGregor announced his interest in snapping up the unnamed clubs on social media but quickly deleted the post.

arts.ttl: How much Elon Musk is really worth amid proposal to buy Liverpool
arts.sum: Elon Musk's father, Erroll, has admitted that his son would be interested in buying Liverpool, and if the tech guru's net worth is anything to go by, a deal could certainly be on the cards

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Liverpool simulated to predict Carabao Cup semi-final clash
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Tottenham in the Carabao Cup on Wednesday, so we simulated the clash to predict what could happen

arts.ttl: Why Liverpool contract conundrum could create 'toxic atmosphere'
arts.sum: The Monday Night Club's Rory Smith explains why Liverpool might not be in full control of contract negotiations.

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Aston Villa set to battle for PSG defender
arts.sum: Tottenham and Aston Villa are both considering January moves for Paris Saint-Germain defender Milan Skriniar. The Slovakian centre-back is free to leave PSG this month and has been subject of a loan approach from Turkish champions Galatasaray. arts.ttl: Ambitious Bologna wait for Liverpool decision on Chiesa – report
arts.sum: Corriere dello Sport claims that Bologna are waiting for a Liverpool decision on Federico Chiesa...

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Spurs weighing up move to rival Aston Villa for forward transfer, plus Serie A duo monitored
arts.sum: Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou has asked the club to explore possible signings in defence and attack for this January’s transfer window, even if the priority remains defence, due to the club’s long injury list in that position. arts.ttl: Four Liverpool players drop early team news hints vs Tottenham with Arne Slot decision expected
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news ahead of Wednesday night's Carabao Cup semi-final first leg clash against Spurs at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium

arts.ttl: Liverpool seal loan signing of Sam Kerr … from Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Scotland midfielder won title with Bayern Vows to bring ‘energy and passion’ Liverpool have signed Sam Kerr on loan until the end of the season. Not to be confused with Australia and Chelsea forward of the same name, the midfielder joins Liverpool from Bayern Munich. Having moved to Germany from Rangers in 2023, Kerr won the Frauen-Bundesliga in her first season. The Liverpool manager, Matt Beard, said: “We nearly had a deal done for Sam before she went to Bayern Munich. She’s a player we’ve watched from afar for a long time. We’re probably getting a more complete player now, a little bit older with experience of playing for one of the biggest European women’s football teams.” Continue reading...
